task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Daily Report ETL** (Level 8)

ARCHETYPE: etl_pipeline. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no auth), CRON schedule (every day at 6am), FETCH from external URL, TRANSFORM each record (not pass-through — derive a new field), SAVE to a destination table. The distinguishing signal from data_sync: the transform step is meaningful (here: extract title + compute body_length from raw posts). DO NOT build a dashboard or a multi-chart page. DO NOT add auth. Only one verification end
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a DailyReports table:
  source_id (number)
  title
  body_length (number)
  fetched_at_date, auto

every day at 6am:
  posts = get data from 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts'
  for each post in posts:
    post_body_length = length of post's body
    post_title = post's title
    post_id = post's id
    save { source_id is post_id, title is post_title, body_length is post_body_length } to DailyReports

when user calls GET /api/reports:
  reports = get all DailyReports
  send back reports
